overview.description: The iShares Core 40/60 Moderate Allocation ETF (AOM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Target Risk Moderate index. The fund tracks a proprietary index that provides exposure to fixed income securities, with a smaller exposure to equities in order to seek current income, some capital preservation, and modest capital appreciation. AOM was launched on Nov 4, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.
